title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
